report.technique: Standard 4-view digital mammography of both breasts with tomosynthesis.
report.findings: Bilateral breast tissue is heterogeneously dense. No suspicious mass, calcification, or architectural distortion. Skin and nipples are normal. Axillary regions are clear.
report.impression:
1. No mammographic evidence of malignancy bilaterally.
2. BI-RADS 1.
